title: Single cell RNA-seq profiles of patient derived organoids
content: E-MTAB-13123 Single cell RNA-seq profiles of patient derived organoids RNA-seq of coding RNA from single cells EFO EFO_0005684 Homo sapiens Three patient-derived organoids from liver metastasis of CRC samples were profiled by scRNA-seq.
